case.title: VILLAGE OF RIDGEFIELD PARK v. BERGEN COUNTY BD. OF TAX.

opinion.h: VILLAGE OF RIDGEFIELD PARK v. BERGEN COUNTY BD. OF TAX., 365 U.S. 648 (1961)
VILLAGE OF RIDGEFIELD PARK ET AL. v. BERGEN COUNTY BOARD OF TAXATION ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF NEW JERSEY. No. 674. Decided April 3, 1961.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
David D. Furman, Attorney General of New Jersey, Theodore I. Botter, Assistant Attorney General, and Milton T. Lasher for appellees.
The motions to dismiss are granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
